101010101011001000111110110111110001000000110011001110011010010010 - ASI: 27

Rules:
  00 = 0 * 0
  10 = 1 * 0
  11 = 1 * 1
  001 = 00 * 1
  011 = 0 * 11
  0010 = 00 * 10
  1001 = 1 * 001
  1010 = 10 * 10
  1011 = 10 * 11
  00100 = 001 * 00
  01111 = 011 * 11
  100110 = 1001 * 10
  0010000 = 00100 * 00
  0111110 = 01111 * 10
  10010010 = 1001 * 0010
  10101010 = 1010 * 1010
  001100110 = 001 * 100110
  011100110 = 011 * 100110
  011111011 = 01111 * 1011
  101100100 = 1011 * 00100
  0010000001100110 = 0010000 * 001100110
  0111110110111110 = 011111011 * 0111110
  01110011010010010 = 011100110 * 10010010
  10101010101100100 = 10101010 * 101100100
  001000000110011001110011010010010 = 0010000001100110 * 01110011010010010
  101010101011001000111110110111110 = 10101010101100100 * 0111110110111110
  101010101011001000111110110111110001000000110011001110011010010010 = 101010101011001000111110110111110 * 001000000110011001110011010010010
